sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33701" key="e(liko/rroos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑλῐκό-ρροος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33701.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with winding stream</tr_>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:20:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.20.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
